'Even under missiles we carry on living' - how young Iranians are coping with warIranians say they are sheltering at home and rarely venturing out on near-empty streets as the US-Israeli bombing campaign continues. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c1mj1pyrzryo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c1mj1pyrzryo#0 Wed, 11 Mar 2026 16:00:34 GMT
Hundreds of GPs tell BBC they have never refused a sick note over mental health concernsThe number of fit notes issued has been rising, with more than 11.2m approved in England last year. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c20lew24kngo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c20lew24kngo#0 Thu, 12 Mar 2026 00:01:53 GMT
Epstein used modelling agent to recruit girls, Brazilian women tell BBCModelling agent used businesses to recruit girls and arrange US visas to visit Jeffrey Epstein, Brazilian women tell BBC. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cr4576v66kno?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cr4576v66kno#0 Thu, 12 Mar 2026 00:05:52 GMT
PM warned of 'reputational risk' over Mandelson's Epstein linksDocuments also suggest the peer explored the possibility of a £500,000 severance payment after being sacked as US ambassador. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd70lgywgqqo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd70lgywgqqo#0 Wed, 11 Mar 2026 18:30:20 GMT
Chris Mason: There may be no knockout blows from Mandelson files but it's far from overThis first digital document drop about the prime minister's decision to appoint Lord Mandelson as US ambassador is interesting, but not explosive. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c627x7g2l4vo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c627x7g2l4vo#0 Wed, 11 Mar 2026 23:54:45 GMT

Inquiry into student loans launched by MPsThe Treasury Committee will look at whether "the goalposts [have] been moved in a way which is unfair". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdxg70rr2geo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdxg70rr2geo#0 Thu, 12 Mar 2026 00:03:21 GMT
Social media firms asked to toughen up age checks for under-13sInstagram, Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube and Roblox are among the platforms UK regulators say aren't putting children's safety at the heart of their products. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn48n18pg1eo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn48n18pg1eo#0 Thu, 12 Mar 2026 00:01:42 GMT
Head chef resigns from world-famous restaurant Noma amid abuse allegationsRené Redzepi had previously apologised after ex-employees of the Danish restaurant accused him of creating a toxic work environment. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c07jr2pe5j9o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c07jr2pe5j9o#0 Thu, 12 Mar 2026 04:09:16 GMT
Wind warnings issued as colder weather and mountain snow head southStrong winds are likely across many parts of the UK and conditions are turning colder towards the end of the week. https://www.bbc.com/weather/articles/cz9q7y44ep4o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/weather/articles/cz9q7y44ep4o#0 Thu, 12 Mar 2026 00:41:04 GMT
